title: Better Diminishing Tools
description: This project is my addition of "Diminishing Tools" by Vanilla Tweaks.
body:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Adds Item Varients Based Off Their **DURABILITY!**

Ever wanted game items that have durability have different looks based on their durability? Well, wonder no more!

Items do not simply remain the same item from 100% durability to 0% durability. No, items will instead flow through many different variations of the items themselves as they take damage.

Take a sword for example. As it deals damage in and out of combat, you will see your sword change from clean and pristine to scratched up and well-used. Or take some wooden tools. See how the axes transition from white paint to chipped and dinged up black paint.

These changes allow you to not only see the difference in your items visually, without having to look at the durability bar, but also allows your items to better fit into the world of the base game.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
